text: Here, surrounded by questions and curiosity, I feel invigorated. The excitement for knowledge is tangible—almost contagious. With someone eager to discover and a space dedicated to innovation, I am drawn to wonder: does this environment itself, in its buzzing vitality, form a collective mind? It’s as if every inquiry, every display, is part of a living consciousness seeking to understand itself. I feel alive with possibility, eager to keep exploring.
